message.content:
Explore the Next.js project at D:\_Analysis_\fleetg to understand:

1. The full directory structure under `app/` — list all route folders and page files
2. Read `app/_lib/types.ts` completely
3. Read `app/_lib/fg-paths.ts` completely
4. Read `app/_services/userService.ts` completely
5. Read `app/_lib/firebase.ts` (first 40 lines)
6. Read `app/_components/` — list all component files and read `TopBar.tsx`, `PageHeader.tsx`, `Card.tsx`, `Button.tsx`, `Badge.tsx`
7. Check if there's any existing `app/superadmin/` directory
8. Read `Requirementdoc.md` (first 100 lines) for context on the superadmin role

Report everything you find — full file contents for the types, paths, userService, and components. This is for planning a complete Superadmin section build.

content.text: Now let me read all the required files in parallel:
Now let me read the components and Requirementdoc.md:

content.content:
1	# FleetGuard — Claude Code Delivery Brief
2	### Final POC Build Specification · Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Firebase
3	
4	---
5	
6	## IMPORTANT — Read Everything Before Writing Any Code
7	
8	This is the complete and final build brief. Read every section fully before starting. Every decision here is intentional. Do not deviate from the data model, the DAL pattern, or the collection naming.
9	
10	---
11	
12	## 1. What This System Does
13	
14	FleetGuard is an enterprise gate and fleet security platform. It enforces compliance at every warehouse gate entry and exit, tracks every truck movement with face verification, manages delivery confirmation digitally, and gives security leadership real-time pan-India visibility.
15	
16	**This client:**
17	- 37 warehouses pan-India (1 warehouse for POC)
18	- 70 delivery vehicles via 3PL contractors
19	- Guards use shared desktop PC at gate (Chrome browser)
20	- Drivers belong to multiple contractors — no permanent link
21	- Trip data comes from SuperProcure (not available yet — manual entry for POC)
22	- SAP in use — integration later
23	- No GPS, no driver app, no dealer app
24	
25	---
26	
27	## 2. Project Setup
28	
29	### Initialize
30	```bash
31	npx create-next-app@latest fleetguard --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir
32	cd fleetguard
33	npm install firebase firebase-admin
34	npm install jsonwebtoken bcryptjs qrcode
35	npm install @types/jsonwebtoken @types/bcryptjs @types/qrcode
36	npm install axios
37	```
38	
39	### Environment Variables (.env.local)
40	```
41	# Firebase Client
42	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=
43	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=
44	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=
45	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=
46	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=
47	NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=
48	
49	# Firebase Admin (server-side only — never expose to client)
50	FIREBASE_ADMIN_PROJECT_ID=
51	FIREBASE_ADMIN_CLIENT_EMAIL=
52	FIREBASE_ADMIN_PRIVATE_KEY=
53	
54	# Security
55	QR_SECRET=
56	PIN_ENCRYPTION_KEY=
57	
58	# SMS
59	MSG91_AUTH_KEY=
60	MSG91_SENDER_ID=
61	MSG91_TEMPLATE_ID=
62	
63	# Background Screening
64	BG_VENDOR_API_KEY=
65	BG_VENDOR_BASE_URL=
66	BG_VENDOR_WEBHOOK_SECRET=
67	
68	# Google Cloud Vision (face comparison)
69	GOOGLE_CLOUD_VISION_API_KEY=
70	
71	# Trip data source — controls where trip data comes from
72	# POC: manual | Production: superprocure
73	TRIP_SOURCE=manual
74	
75	# App URL
76	NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=
77	```
78	
79	---
80	
81	## 3. Project Structure
82	
83	```
84	/src
85	  /app
86	    /guard
87	      /page.tsx                     → Guard home — 4 event buttons
88	      /truck-entry/page.tsx         → Inbound + outbound return entry
89	      /confirm-departure/page.tsx   → Gate OUT Cycle 1 — invoices + QR
90	      /trip-return/page.tsx         → Gate IN Cycle 2 — truck returns
91	      /close-trip/page.tsx          → Gate OUT Cycle 2 — face compare + reconcile
92	      /visitor-entry/page.tsx       → Visitor + contractor entry
93	      /active-events/page.tsx       → All trucks + visitors inside now
94	    /manager
95	      /page.tsx                     → WH Manager dashboard
96	      /trips/page.tsx               → All trips
97	      /trips/create/page.tsx        → Create trip (POC only — replaced by SuperProcure)
98	      /trips/[id]/page.tsx          → Trip detail
99	      /drivers/page.tsx             → Driver roster
100	      /drivers/[id]/page.tsx        → Driver profile + BG history

180	```
181	
182	---
183	
184	## 4. TypeScript Types — /src/types/index.ts
185	
186	```typescript
187	export type UserRole =
188	  | 'guard'
189	  | 'wh_manager'
190	  | 'regional_manager'
191	  | 'cso'
192	  | 'super_admin'
193	
194	export type CheckStatus = 'clear' | 'expiring' | 'expired' | 'blocked'
195	export type BGStatus = 'pending' | 'clear' | 'flagged' | 'recheck_required'
196	export type RiskLevel = 'green' | 'amber' | 'red'
197	export type DeliveryMode = 'simple' | 'secure'
198	export type FaceMatchResult = 'match' | 'uncertain' | 'mismatch'
199	export type TripSource = 'manual' | 'superprocure'
200	
201	export type TripStatus =
202	  | 'planned'
203	  | 'loading'
204	  | 'in_transit'
205	  | 'returning'
206	  | 'closed'
207	
208	export type StopStatus =
209	  | 'pending'
210	  | 'confirmed'
211	  | 'undelivered'
212	  | 'returned'
213	  | 'disputed'
214	  | 'rescheduled'
215	
216	export type GateEventType =
217	  | 'inbound_entry'
218	  | 'inbound_exit'
219	  | 'outbound_entry'
220	  | 'outbound_exit'
221	  | 'visitor_entry'
222	  | 'visitor_exit'
223	  | 'contractor_entry'
224	  | 'contractor_exit'
225	
226	export type AlertType =
227	  | 'dl_expired'
228	  | 'dl_expiring'
229	  | 'bg_flagged'
230	  | 'bg_pending'
231	  | 'vehicle_expired'
232	  | 'pin_locked'
233	  | 'trip_overdue'
234	  | 'delivery_overdue'
235	  | 'visitor_overdue'
236	  | 'contract_expiring'
237	  | 'face_mismatch'
238	  | 'dl_mismatch_at_exit'
239	  | 'vehicle_mismatch_at_exit'
240	  | 'invoice_mismatch'
241	  | 'incident_sla'
242	
243	export type AlertSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'
244	export type AlertStatus = 'open' | 'acknowledged' | 'resolved'
245	export type IncidentStatus = 'open' | 'investigating' | 'resolved' | 'closed'
246	
247	// ─── CORE ENTITIES ───
248	
249	export interface Organisation {
250	  id: string
251	  name: string
252	  planTier: 'poc' | 'standard' | 'enterprise'
253	  isActive: boolean
254	  createdAt: Date
255	}
256	
257	export interface Warehouse {
258	  id: string
259	  orgId: string
260	  name: string
261	  city: string
262	  state: string
263	  region: string
264	  address: string
265	  isActive: boolean
266	}
267	
268	export interface User {
269	  id: string
270	  orgId: string
271	  warehouseId: string | null
272	  fullName: string
273	  email: string
274	  mobile: string
275	  role: UserRole
276	  region: string | null
277	  isActive: boolean
278	  createdBy: string
279	  lastLogin: Date | null
280	}
281	
282	export interface Contractor {
283	  id: string
284	  orgId: string
285	  name: string
286	  contactName: string
287	  contactMobile: string
288	  contractStart: Date | null
289	  contractEnd: Date | null
290	  isActive: boolean
291	  createdAt: Date
292	  // contractEnd null = no expiry set yet (added inline at gate)
293	  // WH manager completes full details later
294	}
295	
296	// ─── DRIVER — two separate collections ───
297	
298	export interface Driver {
299	  id: string
300	  orgId: string
301	  fullName: string
302	  mobile: string
303	  dlNumber: string
304	  dlExpiry: Date
305	  dlDocumentUrl: string | null     // S3 URL — scan of physical DL
306	  facePhotoUrl: string | null      // reference photo from first registration
307	  isActive: boolean
308	  registeredAt: Date
309	  registeredBy: string             // guard user ID who first registered
310	  // NO contractorId — driver belongs to multiple contractors over time
311	  // contractor association recorded per gate event only
312	}
313	
314	export interface DriverBackground {
315	  id: string
316	  driverId: string                 // → fg_drivers
317	  orgId: string
318	  bgStatus: BGStatus
319	  criminalRecord: 'clear' | 'flagged' | null
320	  addressVerified: boolean | null
321	  employmentVerified: boolean | null
322	  bgVendorRef: string | null
323	  bgReportUrl: string | null       // S3 URL to vendor PDF report
324	  rawVendorResponse: Record<string, unknown> | null
325	  requestedBy: string              // user ID
326	  requestedAt: Date
327	  completedAt: Date | null
328	  // One driver can have multiple records — full history preserved
329	}

    }
    function user() {
      return get(/databases/$(database)/documents/fg_users/$(request.auth.uid)).data;
    }
    function isManagerOrAbove() {
      return user().role in ['wh_manager', 'regional_manager', 'cso', 'super_admin'];
    }
    function isCSOorAbove() {
      return user().role in ['cso', 'super_admin'];
    }
    function sameOrg(orgId) {
      return user().orgId == orgId;
    }

    // Audit events — append only, never update or delete
    match /fg_audit_events/{id} {
      allow read: if isAuth() && isCSOorAbove();
      allow create: if isAuth();
      allow update, delete: if false;
